chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt. Petition No. D- 1480 of 2023 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on o/obj. at flag.A. 2. For orders on CMA No. 6249/2023. 3. For orders on CMA No.6250/2023. 4. For hearing of main case. i. - 22.11.2023 Mr. Qurban Ali Shar Advocate for the petitioner. *********** YOUSUF ALI SAYEED, J- The petitioner has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court in connection with the certain civic works which, according to him, are being undertaken by the respondents for installation of a pipeline at Jail Garden Drainage Disposal Station, Sukkur. He seeks the suspension of such work as well as the suspension of a Resolution dated 31.07.2023 passed by the Sukkur Municipal Corporation, which reflects that the aforementioned Disposal Station is to be upgraded. However, no cogent ground has been raised through the petition to show the illegality afflicting the matter and on query posed, learned counsel was also found wanting on that score. Under the circumstances, no case for issuance of a writ stands made out. The Petition accordingly stands dismissed in limine along with the pending miscellaneous applications. J U D G E J U D G E Akber.
